text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Traditionally, Umamusume who sought the Triple
Crown have gone on to focus on medium- and
long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I've decided to set my eyes on the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen and dominate sprints.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm choosing my own first-rate path this time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Even if it turns out to be a mistake, I won't regret
it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And if it is...
choice_data_list: It still won't be too late to start over.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You seem prepared as well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well then, let's get started. This is our—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ....It's my mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh, what fine timing. Here, hold my phone up
for me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't "huh" me. I said hold it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Okay, the angle is fine. All right, here we go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hello, Mother.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Just what do you think you're doing now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I haven't heard. You're running in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right. I'm here to win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So you admit you've gone insane. This is an
entirely different field—1,200 meters on turf. Do
you understand that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It's a sprint. Your strategy for long-distance races
won't work here.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: It's absurd to assume you can suddenly win in a G1 against professionals! Have you even seen what the reporters have been writing about you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You realize I'm also a pro, don't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I chose this race because I'm an experienced
first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter what anyone says, I have confidence in
my ability to win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just wait and watch. I'll show you what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I've said my piece. Let's get going.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
